IRE Resource Center notice

June 1997
Investigative MethodsJournalism & Newsroom

The Uplink newsletter highlights investigative journalism stories from outlets like the Cleveland Plain Dealer and Arkansas Democrat-Gazette, which can be accessed through the IRE Resource Center with reporter tips available by phone.

Several of the stories featured in this issue of Uplink including the Cleveland Plain Dealer's FDA story and the Arkansas Democrat-Gazette's school ranking story are available through the IRE Resource Center. To order copies of the stories and tips from the reporters who did them, call (573) 882-3364.
